/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=thin CMakeFiles/fastsed_tests.dir/Test/Source/TestReplacement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastsed_tests.dir/Test/Source/TestParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastsed_tests.dir/Test/Source/TestLinker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastsed_tests.dir/Test/Source/TestEngineHelpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastsed_tests.dir/Test/Source/TestIntegration.cpp.o -o Tests/fastsed_tests  libfastsed_core.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgmock.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_iostreams.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 lib/libgtest.a
